title: MTB Cross-Country Simulation
description: XC MTB race demands — punchy climbs, recoveries
purpose: XC MTB race demands — punchy climbs, recoveries

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0: 75% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/28. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 28. Target: 200% FTP, 88-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/28. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is brutal. You chose brutal. Now finish what you started.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Supra-threshold effort. This is the rep that builds your aerobic ceiling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You're not breaking. You're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 26 more of these. 'Only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Easy miles make fast racing. Stop thinking and start pedaling.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This should feel easy. If you're breathing hard, you're going too hard.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. This is where champions are made in the off-season.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Easy spin. 88-95 rpm, Seated. Relax and breathe.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Sweet spot? There's nothing sweet about this. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Threshold effort at 95% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Standing. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: One more block. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Congratulations! You've found the exact wattage where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay controlled. Don't let power spike. Smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. You're building an engine here.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Zone 2 work: conversational pace. You should be able to talk in full sentences.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Consistency over intensity. Show up, do the work, repeat.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Base miles. The work no one sees but everyone needs.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 140% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 140%, Cadence: 88-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your friends are posting their VO2max workouts on Strava. You're being smart.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance zone: 75% FTP. Fat oxidation, mitochondrial biogenesis, capillary density.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Not every workout needs to hurt. This is smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Easy does it. 75% FTP. Build your engine.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Standing at 82-90 rpm, 200% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 82-90 rpm. Focus on smooth circles, not stomping.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep. Leave nothing in reserve. You can rest when you're done.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2 of 4. The suffering is progressive, like the tax system.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep of the set. Be patient. Find the groove.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. This is the foundation of all cycling fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Base training: the secret weapon of every great cyclist.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your friends are doing threshold intervals. You're being smart.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Zone 2. Easy effort. This is recovery in disguise.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This should hurt just enough to make you question your sanity. You're doing it right.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2: 82-90 rpm, Standing. Focus on smooth, sustainable power.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is where mediocre riders crack and champions push through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 2 of 4. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Midway through. Check your form. Relax your shoulders.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is easy because it's supposed to be. Don't make it harder than it needs to be.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Steady state endurance. 60% FTP. Sustainable for hours.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This might feel too easy. That's the point. Patience builds power.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Conversational pace. Save your matches for the hard days.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 82-90 rpm, 140% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Slow down. Yes, slower. Your aerobic system is thanking you right now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training your body to burn fat efficiently.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your future self will thank you for these base miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 3: 200% FTP. Standing. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 200%, Cadence: 75-85 rpm, Position: Standing. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your competition quit 2 reps ago. You're still here. That's the difference.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Target: 110% FTP, 75-85 rpm, Seated. Lock in and execute.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This hurts, but you're choosing to be here. That's what separates you.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: If you can read this, you're not going hard enough. Just kidding. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: This is hard. That's the point. Keep your rhythm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Base training: the secret no one wants to do. That's why it works.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Zone 2: where mitochondria multiply and aerobic capacity expands.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Easy miles = fast racing. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay patient. Stay easy. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You wanted to get faster. This is how. Stop complaining and pedal.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Threshold block: maximize time at lactate threshold without crossing into VO2 territory.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You can hold this. Your body knows what to do. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Threshold work: where you live in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost done. Stay strong. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2. Boring? Maybe. Effective? Absolutely. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Low intensity, high volume. Building your engine from the ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Relax and enjoy the ride. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Endurance pace. Let your mind wander. Stay in zone.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 20/28. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 20 of 28. Target: 140% FTP, 75-85 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 20. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 20/28. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This feels like nothing. That's the point. Patience builds power, not suffering.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance pace: majority of work should be nose breathing. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Zone 2 is where fitness quietly accumulates. Trust it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 22/28. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 22 of 28. Target: 200% FTP, 95-105 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 22. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 22/28. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 23/28. Your legs are screaming. Good. That means it's working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: You've accumulated 29min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 23 of 28 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 23: where dreams go to die, and watts go to live.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost there. Keep the power smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2 is like compound interest. Boring, but it builds wealth over time.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training your body to burn fat efficiently.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. This is where champions are made in the off-season.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay patient. Stay easy. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your legs are burning. Perfect. That's lactate threshold doing its job.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Sweet spot work: just below FTP. You should be able to maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway through. You're not fading, you're adapting. Keep going.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: it was not fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost done. Stay strong. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Base training: the secret no one wants to do. That's why it works.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Zone 2 work: conversational pace. You should be able to talk in full sentences.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your future self will thank you for these base miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Easy does it. 60% FTP. Build your engine.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 27/28. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 27 of 28. Target: 140% FTP, 95-105 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 27. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 27/28. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This feels like nothing. That's the point. Patience builds power, not suffering.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Steady state endurance. 75% FTP. Sustainable for hours.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Consistency over intensity. Show up, do the work, repeat.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: the pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you're on a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Relax your grip. Drop your shoulders. Smooth pedaling.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 55% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 4: 60% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 60%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.
